text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're about halfway through summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's run, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri... Yeah, let's run.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: See ya soon, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two run off side by side, as if they're both on
cloud nine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh, fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri, there's somethin' I wanna ask ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whatcha racin' for? Does it got somethin' to do
with you bein' from the boonies? Are ya tryin' to
show everyone you're just as good as the rest?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Show them I'm just as good, huh...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I don't... think that's it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I just want to do my best for the people
supporting me in my hometown. They cheer me
on from afar, and I treasure them very much.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You treasure 'em, huh... So that's how it is. Yeah, I
can relate to that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But... if ya treasure 'em so much, don'tcha wanna
be with 'em back home? Y'know, instead of bein'
out here in the central scene.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've never felt that way. I have no intention of
quitting races and going back to my hometown.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? How come?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Because me winning in the central races is
everybody's dream.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They've all bet their dreams on me. They're
crossing their fingers for me, hoping I'll win and
become a star Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't fulfill those dreams back home. If I return
now, it'll never happen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's why running in the Twinkle Series is so
important to me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So your dream... is to run. I get it now...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Oguri... You 'n me are real similar after all. I'm
runnin' for my family, and you're runnin' for your
hometown.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(But while I was here frettin', you were busy
overtakin' me.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Y'know, I understand what ya mean when ya say
that it's everyone's dream to see ya run...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, can I ask ya one more thing? I'm not sure
why, but seein' ya race gets my heart thumpin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What're ya thinkin' about when you're runnin'
down that final stretch?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
On the final stretch... there's nothing on my mind.
In those last moments...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm empty. By then, I've got nothing left. I'm so
empty I can barely run anymore...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But that's when...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I see their faces. Shige, Chiyo, Yoshi—everyone
who came to see me off.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They've given me so much food and cheered me
on every step of the way... I just want to do
whatever it takes to live up to their support.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That thought relights the fire... in my heart, my
stomach, and all the way to the tips of my toes...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And then I start running again. My body gets its
second wind somehow.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
As long as I have the power they've given me... I
can't lose.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya mean... ya burn out mid-race, but then bounce
right back?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So that's why your races are so excitin'... No, the
real takeaway here is...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Her determination to return the favor is so
strong that it lifts her up when she's got nothin'
left to give. That's her secret...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I see it now... We seem similar, but we're not.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're my total opposite.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I am?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. See, you stock up on strength by eatin', so
to speak. You fill up on all the food and support
ya get from the people close to ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But I'm the opposite. My strength comes from hunger. It's like, "Even though I can't eat, l'm still gonna eat it!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We've both seen the same struggles, but we're
handlin' 'em in our own way. I dunno if it's our
personalities, or if this is just one big
coincidence...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But yeah, Oguri, you're...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(You're like another me. The me I coulda been in
some other reality or somethin'...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Someone that had all the support in the world,
even though they were poor. In other words...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(The exact Umamusume I dreamed of becomin' as
a kid.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it all makes sense now... No wonder ya
grabbed my attention...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're... a special case. I can't just slink off from
ya with my tail tucked between my legs.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If it's you we're talkin' about, then I gotta run no
matter what. Plus, we gotta settle this once 'n for
all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama... I'm glad you feel that way.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (I wanna run right now! I wanna run with her! And I just gotta win!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(But... now's not the time. Just gotta be patient a
li'l longer.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But that reminds me. Oguri, you still got the
Classics to get through.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
First things first, go for gold at the Kikuka Sho. I
know ya got it in ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's the matter, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I won't be running in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why not? Oh, yeah. You're better with shorter
distances, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That is true, but it's not about that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The reason I'm not going to the Kikuka Sho is...
Well, because...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You won't be there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've been wondering since last summer... Maybe
even before that, actually.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering... just how tenacious you could
be. And how strong you'd become.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And just how much more I'd respect you then. I
never would have met an Umamusume like you
back in my hometown.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but want to race with you. And the
sooner that happens, the better.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So I'm not going to race in the Kikuka Sho. I'll run
in the autumn Tenno Sho instead. And that's
because...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want to beat you, Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri... Y-you...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're just so...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, am I... bothering you? I'm sorry, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Damn right you're botherin' me! The idea of you hoppin' on the autumn Tenno Sho train...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Is da most excitin' thing I coulda asked for! Dis
ROCKS! Ya finally came out 'n said it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But if that's how ya feel, just try to imagine how I'm feelin'! How am I s'posed to wait till fall?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're my one 'n only rival! The junior hot on my
trail, chasin' after her goal. You're da whole
package!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. You better come at me with all ya got
this year! I'm settin' up autumn 'n winter as the
stages for our showdown!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You bein' a classic-year runner don't mean a
thing. Gimme everythin' ya got!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Cause I'm gonna take all dat 'n send it right back
atcha!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Sure thing, Tama. I'm really glad I opened up to
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Tamamo Cross shares the details of
their talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two massive dreams are about to collide, and
from that, a dazzling drama will surely unfold.
